first_paragraph: ***James Tont operazione D.U.E.*** or ***The Wacky World of James Tont*** is a 1966 [French](/wiki/France "France")/[Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy")[[1]](#cite_note-1) [international co-production](/wiki/International_co-production "International co-production") [spy film](/wiki/Spy_film "Spy film") spoof based on [James Bond](/wiki/James_Bond "James Bond")'s *[Thunderball](/wiki/Thunderball_(film) "Thunderball (film)")* and featuring elements predating the release of *[You Only Live Twice](/wiki/You_Only_Live_Twice_(film) "You Only Live Twice (film)")*. Directed by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci"), the [Eurospy](/wiki/Eurospy "Eurospy") [spy-fi](/wiki/Spy-Fi_(subgenre) "Spy-Fi (subgenre)") comedy adventure is the sequel to *[James Tont operazione U.N.O.](/wiki/James_Tont_operazione_U.N.O. "James Tont operazione U.N.O.")* (1965) with [Lando Buzzanca](/wiki/Lando_Buzzanca "Lando Buzzanca") repeating his role as [00 Agent](/wiki/00_Agent "00 Agent") James Tont, a satire of [James Bond](/wiki/James_Bond "James Bond") and [Loris Gizzi](/wiki/Loris_Gizzi "Loris Gizzi") as the black monocle wearing [supervillain](/wiki/Supervillain "Supervillain") spoof of [Emilio Largo](/wiki/Emilio_Largo "Emilio Largo").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1966 film

| James Tont operazione D.U.E. | |
| --- | --- |
| Original [film poster](/wiki/Film_poster "Film poster") | |
| Directed by | [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") |
| Written by | [Luigi Carpentieri](/wiki/Luigi_Carpentieri "Luigi Carpentieri") |
| Produced by | Luigi Carpentieri [Ermanno Donati](/wiki/Ermanno_Donati "Ermanno Donati") |
| Starring | [Lando Buzzanca](/wiki/Lando_Buzzanca "Lando Buzzanca") |
| Cinematography | [Alessandro D'Eva](/w/index.php?title=Alessandro_D%27Eva&action=edit&redlink=1 "Alessandro D'Eva (page does not exist)") |
| Music by | [Bruno Canfora](/wiki/Bruno_Canfora "Bruno Canfora") |
| Release date | * March 1966 (1966-03) |
| Running time | 92 minutes |
| Country | Italy/France |
| Language | [Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language") |

***James Tont operazione D.U.E.*** or ***The Wacky World of James Tont*** is a 1966 [French](/wiki/France "France")/[Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy")[[1]](#cite_note-1) [international co-production](/wiki/International_co-production "International co-production") [spy film](/wiki/Spy_film "Spy film") spoof based on [James Bond](/wiki/James_Bond "James Bond")'s *[Thunderball](/wiki/Thunderball_(film) "Thunderball (film)")* and featuring elements predating the release of *[You Only Live Twice](/wiki/You_Only_Live_Twice_(film) "You Only Live Twice (film)")*. Directed by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci"), the [Eurospy](/wiki/Eurospy "Eurospy") [spy-fi](/wiki/Spy-Fi_(subgenre) "Spy-Fi (subgenre)") comedy adventure is the sequel to *[James Tont operazione U.N.O.](/wiki/James_Tont_operazione_U.N.O. "James Tont operazione U.N.O.")* (1965) with [Lando Buzzanca](/wiki/Lando_Buzzanca "Lando Buzzanca") repeating his role as [00 Agent](/wiki/00_Agent "00 Agent") James Tont, a satire of [James Bond](/wiki/James_Bond "James Bond") and [Loris Gizzi](/wiki/Loris_Gizzi "Loris Gizzi") as the black monocle wearing [supervillain](/wiki/Supervillain "Supervillain") spoof of [Emilio Largo](/wiki/Emilio_Largo "Emilio Largo").

Following this film Corbucci wrote a [parody](/wiki/Parody "Parody") of *[Our Man Flint](/wiki/Our_Man_Flint "Our Man Flint")* called *[Il vostro super agente Flit](/wiki/Il_vostro_super_agente_Flit "Il vostro super agente Flit")* (1966), directed by [Mariano Laurenti](/wiki/Mariano_Laurenti "Mariano Laurenti").

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=James_Tont_operazione_D.U.E.&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

After foiling a Soviet break in at the [Embassy of the United Kingdom in Moscow](/wiki/Embassy_of_the_United_Kingdom_in_Moscow "Embassy of the United Kingdom in Moscow"), Her Majesty's Secret Service Agent James Tont is invited to speak at an International Secret Agents Convention in [Geneva](/wiki/Geneva "Geneva"). With apologies read from [James Bond](/wiki/James_Bond "James Bond") for being absent due to his being involved in Operation *Thunderball*, Tont defends the modern "Supermen of the Secret Service" agents against the more Old Guard of traditional spies and intelligence agents whilst simultaneously evading several Soviet assassination attempts during his speech. Following his well received speech, Tont is tripped by a child spy working with the sister of [Mata Hari](/wiki/Mata_Hari "Mata Hari"), an agent of the Old Guard. Tont falls down a flight of stairs incurring a leg injury that leads him to be treated at a [health spa](/wiki/Health_spa "Health spa").

Another patient present at the health spa is Mr. Spring, the head of the Magnus international food corporation. Unknown to each other, Spring is also the secret head of an unnamed criminal organisation. Spring and Tont become rivals for the romantic attention of Nurse Clarissa with each attempting to injure or kill each other when engaged in their [therapeutic treatments](/wiki/Therapy "Therapy"). Spring appears to be the winner when Tont is found frozen to death inside an [isolation tank](/wiki/Isolation_tank "Isolation tank") that Nurse Clarissa placed him in.

The British Secret Service revives Tont who has only been [cryogenically frozen](/wiki/Cryogenics "Cryogenics") but uses his well publicised death to enable him to infiltrate a criminal scheme to attack an unknown religious centre in a project called "Operazione D.U.E./Operation T.W.O.". The organisation is also attempting to steal components to assemble a powerful weapon called a [synchrophasotron](/wiki/Synchrophasotron "Synchrophasotron").

Tont travels to London disguised as a [beatnik](/wiki/Beatnik "Beatnik") named "Bingo Kowalski" in order to infiltrate a group of young hipsters suspected in stealing the first component of the weapon. At the Blue Dolphin [discotheque](/wiki/Discotheque "Discotheque") Tont successfully seduces Helen, Spring's agent who has used the beatniks to steal the second component of the weapon. Tont further infiltrates Spring's organisation to take the identity of one of Spring's operatives who replaces an American astronaut. Spring's scheme is for his agent to hijack an American [space capsule](/wiki/Space_capsule "Space capsule") launched from [Cape Kennedy](/wiki/Cape_Kennedy "Cape Kennedy") that contains the final element needed to create the synchrophasertron.

Using advanced electronic devices aboard Spring's yacht also named the Blue Dolphin, Tont's space capsule is brought down to be recovered by Spring. Spring and his cohorts pass the time by playing a James Bond board game. Identified by Spring's men, Tont is captured but discovers "Operazione D.U.E." means "Destruction Urbi Eterna", the destruction of the [Eternal City](/wiki/Rome "Rome"); specifically Spring's plan to steal the treasures of the Vatican and destroy [St. Peter's Basilica](/wiki/St._Peter%27s_Basilica "St. Peter's Basilica").

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=James_Tont_operazione_D.U.E.&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Lando Buzzanca](/wiki/Lando_Buzzanca "Lando Buzzanca") as James Tont
* [France Anglade](/wiki/France_Anglade "France Anglade") as Helene
* [Loris Gizzi](/wiki/Loris_Gizzi "Loris Gizzi") as Mr. Spring
* [Claudie Lange](/wiki/Claudie_Lange "Claudie Lange") as Clarissa
* [Antonella Murgia](/w/index.php?title=Antonella_Murgia&action=edit&redlink=1 "Antonella Murgia (page does not exist)") as Samantha
* [Jacques Dufilho](/wiki/Jacques_Dufilho "Jacques Dufilho") as Y
* [Geoffrey Copleston](/wiki/Geoffrey_Copleston "Geoffrey Copleston") as Head of Secret Service
* [Furio Meniconi](/wiki/Furio_Meniconi "Furio Meniconi") as Spring's Henchman
* [Aldo Bonamano](/w/index.php?title=Aldo_Bonamano&action=edit&redlink=1 "Aldo Bonamano (page does not exist)") as [KGB](/wiki/KGB "KGB") spy
* [Mirko Valentin](/w/index.php?title=Mirko_Valentin&action=edit&redlink=1 "Mirko Valentin (page does not exist)") as Lopez
* [Franco Ressel](/wiki/Franco_Ressel "Franco Ressel") as Jack Clifford, the spaceman
* [Enzo Consoli](/w/index.php?title=Enzo_Consoli&action=edit&redlink=1 "Enzo Consoli (page does not exist)")
* [Francesco Sormano](/w/index.php?title=Francesco_Sormano&action=edit&redlink=1 "Francesco Sormano (page does not exist)") as the chairman at the International Spies Congress
* [Sara Tonini](/w/index.php?title=Sara_Tonini&action=edit&redlink=1 "Sara Tonini (page does not exist)")
* [Renato Montalbano](/wiki/Renato_Montalbano "Renato Montalbano") as Von Bergen
